name: IdsEdwPrvcyExtrnlMbrDDel

text.value: DELETE T FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PRVCY_EXTRNL_MBR_D T JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.Rb1_TMP_IdsEdwPrvcyExtrnlMbrDDel S ON T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.PRVCY_EXTRNL_MBR_UNIQ_KEY = S.PRVCY_EXTRNL_MBR_UNIQ_KEY
